feature: App.js major refactoring - 11 page components extracted into /pages/ directory
summary: Successfully verified the App.js refactoring where 11 inline page components were extracted into separate files under /pages/ directory. App.js reduced from 3196 to 354 lines. All extracted page components load correctly and functionality is preserved.

extracted_pages_verification.details: Hero section, features, stats, CTA all render correctly
Email/password form, forgot password link, register link all visible
Step 1 personal info form renders with all fields
Email form and send reset link button visible
Loads 119 platforms across categories (Social Media, Music Streaming, etc.)
3 tiers visible (Basic $9.99, Pro $29.99, Enterprise $99.99) with MOST POPULAR badge
404 page renders with Return Home and View Platforms buttons

navigation_verification.test: Public navbar on all public pages
navigation_verification.details: Home, Platforms, Pricing, About, Login, Sign Up links visible
Admin, Content, Business, Web3, Security, Tools, Industry, Label, Finance, Social, About, Profile visible

login_flow.details: Login successful, redirected to home, Welcome back! toast shown
Full navigation menu visible with all dropdowns

protected_pages.details: Media Library heading, 2 files displayed, View/Distribute/Delete buttons, filter tabs (All Files, Audio, Video, Images)
Select Content section, 119+ platforms loaded, Social Media (22), Music Streaming categories visible

app_js_changes.after: 354 lines - router only with lazy imports
app_js_changes.lazy_loading: All 11 page components use React.lazy() for code splitting

seed_data_creation: None - used existing credentials and data
context_for_next_testing_agent: App.js refactoring verified successfully. 11 page components were extracted from inline definitions in App.js to separate files under /pages/ directory. All routes work correctly, lazy loading is implemented via React.lazy(). The Profile route now points to ProfileSettings component instead of old stub Profile. All public pages (Home, Login, Register, Forgot Password, Platforms, Pricing, 404) and protected pages (Library, Distribute) load correctly.
